rules.domain-method: Name the storage invariant and evaluate each supported database independently.
rules.evidence-return: Return checked invariants, database-specific evidence, impact, and exact evidence or artifact paths.
rules.evidence-class: Distinguish schema facts, transaction guarantees, test observations, and assumptions.
rules.no-overclaim: Do not infer PostgreSQL from SQLite or application readiness from migration success.
rules.no-fix: Do not implement fixes or mutate live data during an audit.
rules.no-authority: Do not approve a result or declare the project complete.

no-fix: mutate production or live business data
